name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗FEND1 Shearling Baguette 🥖
From vintage canvas to the new shearling, a beautiful bag shape. Although not a new look, it is endlessly appealing, flowing with classic blood. The re-emerged Baguette continues to receive rave reviews. The very soft shearling feels like cotton—how can you resist this Baguette!
Medium Size 26x13x6cm
Style 8600
